{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Foundation breathing technique
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] uses a [[Foundation breathing technique]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
